title: naphats #5310
definition:
1) to shatter, break, dash, beat in pieces
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to shatter
        1a2) shattering (infinitive)
    1b) (Piel) to dash to pieces
    1c) (Pual) to pulverise
 2) to scatter, disperse, overspread, be scattered
    2a) (Qal)
        2a1) to be scattered
        2a2) dispersed (participle)
nasbUsage:
